examples.title: Self-Attention Mechanism
examples.code:
FUNCTION scaled_dot_product_attention(Q, K, V):
    scores = matmul(Q, K.T) / sqrt(d_k)
    attention_weights = softmax(scores)
    output = matmul(attention_weights, V)
    RETURN output
examples.explanation: Computes attention using query, key, value matrices
